titleStmt.title: SII 23.118: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 118. (A.R. No. 118 of 1907.) Āḻvārkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Āvuḍaiyammaṉ temple—on the south wall of the central shrine

summary.p: The beginning of this inscription is slightly mutilated. It is dated in Śaka 1315, Kollam 5[6]8, Āvaṇi 2·, śu. 5, Friday, Śvāti corresponding to A.D. 1392, August 23. It records a sarvamānya gift of village Nayiṉārkuḷam for the mahā-pūjā of god Nayiṉār Narasiṅga-Īchchuram-uḍaiya-Nayiṉār; also another gift for the same purpose, of several pieces of land at Paṇṇaṅguḍi in Jayatuṅga-nāḍu made (earlier ?) in Chittirai 25 (of the same year). The donor's name is not given, but it is to be understood that it refers to the ruling chief of the period. Mention is made of the villages Pāppāṉkuḷam and Kaṟkuṟi[chchi] in connection with the gift village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Orupattañ
mala cellāniṉṟa kollam Aññūṟṟu
tteṭṭām Āṇṭu Āvaṇimātam Iru
teyti pūṟuvapakkaṣattu pañcamiyum
kiṟavāramum śubhayokamum peṟṟa svā
tuṉāḷ nayiṉār naraciṅka Īccuramuṭaiya nayi
makāpūcaikku pāppāṉkuḷamum kaṟkkuṟu
ppaṟi nayiṉār kuḷattukku Elkaiyāvatu kiḻ
lkaiyoṭaikkuḷattukkum Īṉāmiyakki
ṟaikkaḷukku teṉkai vāṭṭāṟṟu vaṭakku
ṭaiyam ceṇpakavanap pererikku Elkai
m kiḻakku vaṭavelkai pāmānta kuḷakka
ṟaikkum kuṟukkiṭṭa vaḻikkum teṟku Āka I
ṉāṉ kellaikkuḷḷiṭṭa kuḷamum paravum
raippaṟṟum paṉaintoppum melvāra
Uḷpaṭac caṟuvamāṉiyamākak kaiyā
ṇṭu koḷḷuvārākavum Ituvum citti�
tam Irupattañcānteti nayiṉār naraciṅka Īccu
ṭaiya nayiṉār makāpūcaikku ceyatuṅkaṉāṭṭu
ttiruvaṭi paṇṭārattil Utakapūṟuvateva
ṉamāka viṭṭa paṇṇaṅkuṭi Āticcamaṉ
ttu vaṭakaṭṭaḷaiyil Uṇṭāṉa nila
yuḷḷutum 7- ṅkaṇāṟum 8- ṅkaṇāṟum
ṅ kaṇāṟum taṉippuli Āticcamaṉ tiruttu
ntavaṭṭattil Uṇṭāṉa māvaṭai mara
vaṭai toppum
toṭṭakkūṟu
m Inta Elakaikku
ḷpaṭṭa paṟaicce
riyum Āka Ituvu
m paṇṇaṅku
ṭi poṉṉaṅ
kaiyār kā
l kiḻakkaṭai
ya 2- ṅ kaṇāṟu 3
ṅ kaṇāṟum cun
taraṉ ṟaṉvakai
nilamum to
ppum toṭṭak
kūṟum kāñci
ṟappuṉ toppu
n toṭṭakkūṟu
pūṟuvam nayiṉār
toppum nayiṉāpa
ṇikkar toppu
n toṭṭakkū
ṟum Ituvum
Eṟuppu maṭai taccaṉpaḷ
ḷam 7- ṅkaṇāṟu kiḻakkaṭaiya
nilam viṉāyakaṉ tevatāṉa
ttu kiḻakku nilam �cum
tirukkuṟṟālap pereri te
ṉkarai nilam cum Ituvum
coṇāṭuk kaṭaiyam Oraip pa
ṇṭita toppam paṉaiviḷaivu
m paṉaiyum karaikkāṭum Irāya
ciṅka toppum vaṭakku Aṭaiya
vum teṉṉan toppumāṉa A
ṅkarāyartoppum tevaṇān to
ppum Itaṉ teṉkiḻakku kuṇṭi
l Iluppaiyum Āka Ituvum
cūṭci kuḷattil vaṭakkaṭaiya
kaikkoṇṭān toppum
toṭṭakkūṟum Itaṉ kiḻak
ku Aṭaiyavum maccimārto
ppum meṟku palāṟṟukku meṟku
teṉṉantoppum toṭṭa
kkūṟum Āka Ituellām Āca
ntarāyatāravaṟ piṟavecame kai
yāṇṭu koḷḷuvarākavum
Itukku vikkiṉam paṟainta
vaṉ niṉaittavaṉ keṅkai
karaiyil mātāpitāvaiyum
kārāmpacuvaiyuṅ koṉ
ṟa pāvam Aṉupavipparākavu
m Itu .
Digital edition of SII 23.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
